description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This leather belt from puma is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Length: FreesizeMade of leather for durability and styleButtoned clasp in puma cat style to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place in a stylish mannerHoles to customise fitCareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
